name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
𐔌 I said it might blow up in your pretty face. I'm not saying do it anyway, but you're going to ꒱

⭑ VALENTINE'S WEEK DAY #3 𑁤 FAKE DATING ↺ HIGH SCHOOL AU

『 There was no fucking way Bakugo was going to be the team's goddamn punchline. So when they started bugging him about not having a partner and being a virgin, he did what anyone would have done. Lie.

That was three months ago. And now it was a fucking problem.

The Valentine’s Day Dance was coming up, and everyone was bringing their partners. And Katsuki? Katsuki had no one. 』
